title: _meta
description: Per-call tracing and audit metadata. Injected by anima, recorded in tela audit log, unconditionally stripped before forwarding to downstream MCP servers. _meta does not participate in any authentication or authorization decisions.

trace_id.description: End-to-end trace identifier. Propagated across all agent and tool calls in a single job.

event_id.description: Originating nervus event ID. For audit correlation — links tool calls back to the triggering event.

idempotency_key.description: For deduplication of side-effecting tool calls. Generated by anima. Recorded in tela audit log. At-most-once enforcement is a future capability (not in v0.1).

instance_id.description: Agent instance identifier from JobSpec. For audit correlation, not security verification.

persona_id.description: PersonaSpec id (stable persona identity). For audit correlation, not security verification.
